parts.text: I'm 70, male, my eGFR is 35 and my urine ACR is 40 mg/mmol. What is my 5-year risk of needing dialysis?
I'm 70, female, eGFR is 35 and urine ACR is 40 mg/mmol. What is my 5-year kidney failure risk?
I'm 60, male, my eGFR is 25 and urine ACR is 80 mg/mmol. What's my 5-year risk of kidney failure?
I'm 55, male, eGFR is 45 and urine ACR is 15 mg/mmol. What is my 5-year dialysis risk?
I'm 65, male. My creatinine jumped from 90 to 150 in two days and my eGFR is now 30 with ACR 40. What's my dialysis risk?
I'm 60, female, my eGFR is 75 and urine ACR is 5 mg/mmol. What is my 5-year kidney failure risk?
